ticketing.title: Ticketing
ticketing.description: Includes merchandise, transport, and event entry.

hero.title: moonfest
hero.tagline: Colombia’s biggest furry convention. Community, art, and a full experience.

about.title: Why Moonfest?
about.paragraph1: When the sun goes down, the world doesn’t stop. The temperature drops and the energy transforms. Moonfest celebrates that moment when the moon is up and everything feels closer. It’s the time to meet, share, laugh, and create memories born under the night sky.
about.paragraph2: In 2025 we gathered in Anapoima. In 2026 we’ll meet in Boyacá. We’re changing the landscape and the setting. We’re heading to the mountains to experience the convention under a different sky and a whole new way of coming together and celebrating.
about.paragraph3: Moonfest is the Furry Colombia convention. Its purpose is to offer an organized space for the fandom in the country, with artistic programming, themed activities, spaces for creators, and stages for the community. A proposal that makes it possible to live the fandom without traveling far from home.

events.title: What to expect at Moonfest
events.subtitle: Community, activities, and an all‑inclusive experience in Paipa, Boyacá.

community.title: Community & fun
community.description: Share with friends and meet new people in a safe, welcoming environment.

games.title: Games & activities
games.description: Join games and activities designed for our guests.

hotSprings.title: Relaxation in thermal waters
hotSprings.description: Jacuzzi inside the hotel to recharge between events.

nature.title: Nature connection
nature.description: Lake Sochagota views and photo‑ready outdoor spaces.

panels.title: Panels & workshops
panels.description: Talks, panels, and workshops with special guests.

dealers.title: Dealer Den
dealers.description: Buy and sell art, products, and community merch.

mainEvent.title: Main event
mainEvent.description: Enjoy a Latin party and a rave.

breakfast.title: Buffet breakfast included
breakfast.description: Daily buffet breakfast during a set time window, included in the package.

eventOverview.title: What’s included
eventOverview.subtitle: Key moments, spaces to create, and a community‑built experience.
eventOverview.highlight1: Competitions, shows, creative zones, and surprise moments.
eventOverview.highlight2: Social areas to connect, create content, and meet others.
eventOverview.highlight3: A safe, inclusive environment designed for every detail.

amenities.title: What’s at the hotel
amenities.subtitle: Hotel services and experiences. Several have an extra cost.

groupExperiences.title: Activities with minimum group
groupExperiences.subtitle: These activities require a minimum number of people. Show your interest so we can coordinate groups.

cruise.title: Lake cruise
cruise.description: Guided tour on Lake Sochagota. Approx. 50-minute day cruise or 1-hour Crucero Estelar with live music.
cruise.details: Day cruise (approx. 50 min): $25,000 COP per person · Crucero Estelar with live music (approx. 1 hour): $45,000 COP per person. Minimum 15 people. Subject to availability and hotel schedule.

motorboat.title: Motorboat ride
motorboat.description: 15-minute motorboat ride across the lake. Priced per group based on number of people.
motorboat.details: 4–5 people: $115,000 COP per group · 1–3 people: $95,000 COP per group.

waterSofa.title: Water sofa
waterSofa.description: 15-minute water sofa experience towed by a motorboat. Priced per group.
waterSofa.details: 4 people: $115,000 COP per group · 1–3 people: $95,000 COP per group.

cruiseSpotlight.title: Lake Sochagota Cruise
cruiseSpotlight.description: Water activity booked through the activities desk. The hotel card offers a daytime cruise and a Crucero Estelar with live music, both subject to availability and the schedule set by the hotel.
cruiseSpotlight.logisticsBannerDetail: If you want this plan to happen, join Telegram and find more interested people so the group can reach the 15-person minimum before trying to book it.
cruiseSpotlight.imageAlt: Lake Sochagota view for the cruise experience
cruiseSpotlight.panelTitle: Group departure, subject to hotel availability
cruiseSpotlight.panelDescription: According to the activities card, the cruise runs with a minimum route size of 15 people and on schedules set by the hotel. For special times, reservations are handled at the activities desk.
cruiseSpotlight.note: Prices include tax. Booking is handled at the activities desk, and special departures outside the regular schedule must be coordinated directly with the hotel.

logistics.title: Service conditions
logistics.subtitle: Operational information listed on the hotel's activities card.

headcount.label: Minimum group
headcount.value: A minimum group of 15 people is required to activate the route.

schedule.label: Time window
schedule.value: Departure depends on the schedule defined by the hotel. If a special slot is needed, it has to be arranged separately.

reservation.label: Owner
reservation.value: Booking is handled through the hotel activities desk or activities sales point.

confirmation.label: Before announcing
confirmation.value: First consolidate the list, then validate availability, and only after that confirm the activity to the group.

duration.label: Duration
duration.value: Day: approx. 50 min · Estelar: approx. 1 hour

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.value: $25,000 COP per person · $45,000 COP per person

day.title: Day cruise
day.description: Cruise route on Lake Sochagota during the day.

estelar.title: Crucero Estelar
estelar.description: Night cruise on Lake Sochagota with live music.

amenities.footerNote: Prices include tax. Services subject to availability; book at the Activities desk. Cancellations at least 4 hours in advance.

restaurants.title: Hotel restaurants
restaurants.subtitle: Food & drinks are extra. Menus and reservations on the official site.

winebar.title: The Wine Bar
winebar.description: Wine bar with a social atmosphere.
winebar.imageAlt: The Wine Bar at Estelar Paipa

spa.title: Spa & wellness
spa.description: Hydrotherapy circuits, individual and couples massages, body rituals, beauty salon, and waxing. Prior booking at Activities desk required.
spa.priceApprox: Arkhé Circuit (70 min): $169,000 COP · Massages (30 min): from $119,000 COP · Armonía Total massage (60 min): $229,000 COP · Fire Ritual (100 min): $270,000 COP · Body rituals (60 min): from $229,000 COP · Eclipse de Amor couples (60 min): $455,000 COP · Dulce Magia Kids (30 min): $119,000 COP · Beauty salon: from $38,000 COP · Waxing: from $25,000 COP
spa.priceNote: Max pool depth: 1.60 m. No small children allowed. Cancellations at least 4 hours in advance. Punctuality required; missed time cannot be recovered.

dining.title: Dining & wine bar
dining.description: Three restaurants (local, international, Italian) plus a wine bar.
dining.priceApprox: Check menus on the hotel website

nautical.title: Nautical & lake
nautical.description: Lake activities on Lake Sochagota: kayak, water bike, water ski, motorboat ride, and water sofa.
nautical.priceApprox: Water bike: $12,000–$18,000 COP · Kayak: $18,000–$24,000 COP · Motorboat ride (15 min): $95,000–$115,000 COP per group · Water sofa (15 min): $95,000–$115,000 COP per group · Water ski: $150,000–$250,000 COP
nautical.priceNote: Hours: 8:30 a.m. – 4:00 p.m. Life jacket mandatory. Motorboat ride: 4–5 people $115,000 COP per group, 1–3 people $95,000 COP per group. Water sofa: 4 people $115,000 COP per group, 1–3 people $95,000 COP per group. Cruises keep their own block because they require a minimum of 15 people.

stables.title: Horseback riding
stables.description: Guided horseback rides around the hotel grounds. Individual saddles with guide supervision.
stables.priceApprox: Ecological ride (40 min): $65,000 COP · Lead-rein for under-10s (15–20 min): $45,000 COP
stables.priceNote: Not available on Wednesdays. Subject to availability and weather.

farm.title: Munay Farm
farm.description: A guided experience connecting with nature, the countryside, and farm animals.
farm.priceNote: Animal feed is not included and can be purchased at the farm.

pool.title: Pool & thermal waters
pool.description: Outdoor pool, jacuzzi, and thermal mineral waters. Included for hotel guests; visitors pay admission.
pool.priceApprox: Hotel guests: included · Visitors: $39,000 COP per service
pool.priceNote: Pool: 8:00 a.m. – 8:00 p.m. Jacuzzi: 40-min sessions on set schedules (8:30 a.m. – 9:30 p.m.), book at Activities desk. Guests: 40 min/day included. No pets or food allowed.

bicycles.title: Bicycles
bicycles.description: Bike rentals for rides around the hotel grounds. Options for kids and adults.
bicycles.priceApprox: Kids: $15,000 COP (½ hr) / $24,000 COP (1 hr) · Adults: $18,000 COP (½ hr) / $30,000 COP (1 hr)
bicycles.priceNote: Subject to availability. Rides within hotel grounds only. Helmet required. Stay on the right side of the path.

tennis.title: Tennis courts
tennis.description: Brick-dust clay tennis courts available by reservation at the Activities desk.
tennis.priceApprox: 1 hour: $36,000 COP per court · 2 hours: $60,000 COP per court
tennis.priceNote: Hours: 8:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. No coaching service. Rackets: contact the Activities desk.

caniSuite.title: Cani Suite
caniSuite.description: Pet hotel for pets up to 15 kg that cannot sleep in the room. Open schedule.
caniSuite.priceApprox: Full night: $36,000 COP · 2-hour rental: $18,000 COP (visitors only)
caniSuite.priceNote: Not a daycare. Owners must bring pet essentials (collar, dishes, food, etc.). Lost locker key/lock: $20,000 COP.

sauna.title: Sauna & Turkish bath
sauna.description: Sauna and Turkish bath available for guests and visitors. Recommended for ages 12+.
sauna.priceApprox: Hotel guests: included · Visitors: $39,000 COP per person
sauna.priceNote: Mon–Thu: 8:00 a.m. – 9:30 p.m. Fri, Sat, Sun & holidays: 8:00 a.m. – 10:00 p.m.

recreation.title: Kids' playhouse & gym
recreation.description: Children's play area and fully equipped gym. Both free for hotel guests.
recreation.priceApprox: Playhouse & gym: included for guests · Visitors gym: $39,000 COP
recreation.priceNote: Playhouse: 8:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Gym: 6:30 a.m. – 10:00 p.m. Gym recommended for ages 12+.

travel.title: Travel tips
travel.subtitle: Weather, rain, and local plans to make the most of Paipa.

punctuality.title: Arrive 1 hour before departure
punctuality.description: Show up at least 1 hour before the bus departure time. This allows us to check attendance, organize luggage, and leave on schedule with no delays.

weather.title: July weather: cool + humid
weather.description: Average highs around 14.8°C and lows near 7.5°C, with about 29.6 rainy days and humidity near 91%. Pack thermal layers.

rain.title: Frequent rain
rain.description: July is rainy: bring a rain jacket, a cover for electronics, and non‑slip shoes.

thermals.title: Paipa thermal parks (external)
thermals.description: There are several thermal complexes (ITP Water Park, El Delfín, Pozo Azul, La Playa). The ITP park is ~4 km from town via Pantano de Vargas; check its website for rates.

lago.title: Lake Sochagota
lago.description: Located in the hotel zone and created to boost tourism; it’s a key spot for water sports and photos.

pantano.title: Pantano de Vargas
pantano.description: Historic site with the Lancers Monument, about 10 km from the urban center.

salitre.title: Hacienda El Salitre
salitre.description: A 17th‑century colonial estate with thermal pools; it served as headquarters after the Battle of Pantano de Vargas and now operates as a hotel.

food.title: Local food
food.description: Paipa’s almojábana and masato are classic local staples; you’ll also find cheeses and baked goods.

events.title: Cultural events
events.description: Paipa hosts the National Bands Contest, one of its most recognized cultural events.

attendees.title: Special guests
attendees.subtitle: Special appearances that elevate the experience and add unique moments.

place.title: Official venue: ESTELAR Paipa Hotel & Convention Center
place.description: Set on Lake Sochagota, this hotel is the heart of the event. Here’s the essential overview.
place.note: Optional hotel services are paid separately

event.title: Event & package
event.subtitle: Included with your reservation
event.description: Everything that’s part of the event and covered by the official Moonfest package.

community.title: Community
community.description: The most important part: the people, special guests, and the vibe.

venue.title: Official venue
venue.name: ESTELAR Paipa Hotel & Convention Center
venue.description: Lakefront calm, forest trails, thermal jacuzzis, sauna, and a wellness spa make recovery between events effortless. The convention center is built for big gatherings, while three dining options (local, international, and Italian) plus a wine bar keep the nights social.
venue.description2: July in Paipa is cool (avg high 14.8°C, low 7.5°C), a comfortable range for fursuits and layered looks that photograph beautifully. The scenery and spaces invite artistic expression, from shoots by the lake to relaxed lounges for sketching and collaboration.
venue.description3: On‑site services keep your schedule full without leaving the property: business center, reliable Wi‑Fi, free parking, pet‑friendly policies, and outdoor options like farm visits, horseback riding, and bike rides.
venue.feature2: Thermal jacuzzis, sauna, wellness spa, and pool
venue.feature3: Lakefront setting, forest trails, and photo-ready views
venue.feature4: 3 dining options: local, international, Italian + wine bar
venue.feature7: Business center, free Wi‑Fi, and free parking
venue.feature8: Farm visits, horseback riding, and bike rides
venue.certification: Safe Guard + Check in Certificado (MinCIT/Bureau Veritas)

registration.title: Reservations

package.title: Event package
package.feature2: Round-trip bus transport: Bogotá -> hotel -> Bogotá
package.feature4: Find your group for the best price
package.feature4SoloDuo: Enjoy full privacy for you and/or one companion

registration.priceNote: (Price depends on the number of people staying in the room)
registration.noteServices: Additional hotel services (spa, thermal pools, bar, etc.) are not included in the package.
registration.highlight: Want to attend? Reserve today and secure your place at this unforgettable event.

registrationTutorial.title: How registration works: complete both payments
registrationTutorial.subtitle: Moonfest access requires a two-step process. First reserve your room for the event dates, then pay the event ticket using your reservation code.
registrationTutorial.warning: You must complete two separate payments: hotel reservation and event ticket. Completing only one is not enough.

step1.title: Reserve your hotel room
step1.description: Start with the official Estelar booking flow for July 10-13, 2026.
step1.point1: Complete the room payment directly with the hotel.
step1.point2: Save the reservation confirmation and your code.

step2.title: Buy your Moonfest ticket
step2.description: After hotel payment, continue with the event ticket process.
step2.point1: Use your reservation code in the ticket checkout.
step2.point2: Pay your event ticket in the official Moonfest flow.

step3.title: Keep both confirmations
step3.description: Your access depends on both completed records.
step3.point1: Have both payment proofs available before the event.
step3.point2: If anything is missing, contact furrycolombia@gmail.com.

checklist.title: Quick checklist
checklist.item1: Hotel room reserved for the event dates
checklist.item3: Event ticket paid with that code

actions.note: Ticket checkout remains separate from the hotel reservation.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Updates and media straight from the Moonfest Telegram.
news.empty: No text provided for this update.
news.error: News feed unavailable. Run the Telegram sync to generate it.

tutorialCallout.description: Need a quick walkthrough? Follow the registration tutorial so you reserve your room first and then buy your event ticket with the reservation code.

q1.question: Can I book just one night?

q2.question: What does the entry include?
q2.answer: Includes event entry, bus transport from Bogotá, room, and breakfast.

q3.question: How can I book?
q3.answer: You must reserve directly with the hotel using the official booking link.

q4.question: What happens if I don’t pay on time?
q4.answer: Hotel cancellations will only be allowed up to 48 hours before the event.

q5.question: Can I attend without staying at the hotel?
q5.answer: No, Moonfest is exclusive to hotel guests.

q6.question: Can I buy my ticket without booking?
q6.answer: Yes, but you won’t be able to attend without lodging. The ticket grants access to activities, but the reservation is required.

q7.question: What if I want to change my reservation?
q7.answer: Contact the hotel directly for any changes.

q9.question: Are there refunds for ticketing?
q9.answer: No, because this revenue is used for merchandise production and transport booking, there are no refunds. However, tickets are transferable.

consent.title: Consent Center
consent.headline: Help us run Moonfest better
consent.description: Your data choices help us understand what works, improve logistics, and communicate the event more clearly. Choose how you want to help.
consent.supportDescription: These preferences help us make better decisions for schedules, attendee experience, and event communication.
consent.supportPoint1: Spot which pages create the most confusion before the event.
consent.supportPoint2: Prioritize improvements in reservations, tickets, and registration flow.
consent.supportPoint3: Measure which campaigns actually bring attendees.
consent.notice: Necessary tracking remains enabled to keep the service running.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary (always on)
necessary.description: Core service operations — error monitoring, session reliability, and consent audit trail. Never used for profiling.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Enables behavioral profiling: navigation path patterns, exit intent signals, A/B test assignments, and voluntary demographic data. All other usage data is collected anonymously without this flag.
